name: Cuebook
short_description: Sharpen a market idea, make its logic visible, and revisit it later.
long_description: Cuebook is a pre-trade cognition and expression layer for AI agents. Through one natural-language query surface, it can combine Cuebook Cues with persisted market snapshots, sealed candles, news, filings, disclosures, positioning, events, calendars, prediction markets, themes, briefings, settlements, and published Frames. It helps a creator preserve and improve their own thesis, express the result as one title, one reasoned body, and one mobile-first editorial image, and record an exact future checkpoint. Cuebook also supports explicitly confirmed simulated Paper Trades. It never places real-money orders and does not provide investment advice.

integration.authentication: OAuth 2.1 with PKCE and dynamic client registration
integration.paper_trading: simulated only; preview and explicit placement intent required

starter_prompts: Show me Cuebook's latest BTC Cues, market state, and source-linked context.
Compare COIN and HOOD using Cuebook's latest sourced context.
Turn my BTC view into a Frame; ask for my horizon or help me choose one from relevant Cues.
